verses.translation: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh
verses.translation_pt: Pela segurança que Deus deu aos coraixitas.

verses.translation: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer
verses.translation_pt: A segurança deles nas viagens de inverno e verão.

verses.translation: Let them worship the Lord of this House

verses.text: ٱلَّذِيٓ أَطۡعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٖ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنۡ خَوۡفِۭ
verses.translation: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear
verses.translation_pt:
Que os alimentou, livrando-os da fome
e deu-lhes segurança, livrando-os do medo.
